Project Based Education

“Education at KHAS” introduces a brand-new education model that goes beyond traditional approaches, cultivating graduates who are entirely unique and will shape and direct the future world. With our 5 Faculties and 21 Departments, we implement the Project / Case-Based Education Model!

Project / Case-Based Education:

With course programs prepared in collaboration with expert academics from Turkey and abroad, leading representatives from various sectors, and R&D departments of private sector companies,

Where theoretical knowledge and application skills are applied to project development processes,

Featuring an assessment and evaluation system conducted through presentations, discussions, project reports, and articles, instead of classic exams,

Aiming for learning not by memorizing, but by doing, experiencing, and applying,

Where each course has at least one academic and one industry mentor,

Encouraging students to specialize in multiple fields simultaneously through double major and minor programs,

A structure that offers undergraduate students the opportunity to take part in research projects from their freshman year.

Common Courses Department:

Course content in small classes, based on active participation, that improves students’ English skills,

Offering different measurement and evaluation methods that enable students to learn by researching and doing, and encourage teamwork,

Consisting of 4 years of common courses where universal values are conveyed and thinking skills needed by questioning individuals are developed.

Our Industrial Stakeholders:

Play an active role in the creation, execution, and grading of projects,

Provide our students with long-term internship opportunities in production facilities and R&D laboratories.
